name: darwin7381--openclaw-tmux-persistent-process
description: Run programs that survive OpenClaw exec session cleanup and gateway restarts via tmux. Use when you need long-running servers, dev servers, tunnels (ngrok/cloudflared), coding agents, or any process that must outlive the current exec session. Solves: exec background processes getting SIGKILL on session cleanup. Recommended for all OpenClaw users running any long-lived process.
